title: Vision Transformers, on Real Photos
tagline: Patches, positions, and self-attention computed over real pretrained features
summary: A pretrained MobileNet runs live in your browser to turn every patch of your photo into a real 1024-dim feature vector. We then compute honest dot-product attention between those real features — not hand-crafted scalars — and paint the result as an overlay. Upload any photo, drag the patch slider, click a patch, and watch a genuine attention heatmap appear.
highlights: Runs real pretrained MobileNet v2 in-browser via TensorFlow.js to extract 1024-dim feature vectors per patch.
Computes real dot-product softmax attention between those real features — no toy scalars anywhere.
Upload any JPEG/PNG or pick a stock photo; patches, vectors, and attention all recompute.
Toggle position embeddings, change the patch size, click any patch and see its real attention heatmap.
